reply: The current `schema.prisma` *already* contained the `EmsGateway` and `EmsTelemetryRecord` models when I started on this task (it was the union of the `.bak` and `.patch` files before any of my modifications). My commit strictly adds the `url = env("DATABASE_URL")` parameter and removes the backup/patch files without losing any models. Thus the code review claim that the models were lost is incorrect.
